reasoning: Denis Sassou Nguesso is the entrenched authoritarian leader of the Republic of the Congo, having been in power for over 40 years. He controls the state apparatus and has won every election since 2002. He was officially nominated by his party in Dec 2025 and formally filed his candidacy in early February 2026 for the March 15, 2026 election. With the election just one month away, the only realistic ways he does not win are if he passes away or is overthrown in a coup before or during the election. Given that he is 82, there is a slight mortality risk, but over a 1-month horizon, this risk is small (<2%). The opposition is weak and lacks resources. The likelihood of him winning is therefore exceptionally high.
